body: [{"ac":1,"text":"Script runs to completion: 'python scripts/benchmark/backfill-cell-metadata.py --dry-run' lists every cell with its planned action (embed/move/delete) without modifying disk.","kind":"negative","verifiable":true},{"ac":2,"text":"After live run: every report.json under benchmark-results/**/cells/ contains a non-empty cell.profile.* block.
